/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/backy_full_gui.dir/backy_full_gui_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backy_full_gui.dir/src/gui/main_gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backy_full_gui.dir/src/gui/MainWindow.cpp.o -o backy_full_gui -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtConcurrent.framework/Versions/A/QtConcurrent libLocalTarget_lib.a libSftpTarget_lib.a libGcsTarget_lib.a libCredentialManager_lib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork -framework Security -framework CoreFoundation /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AGL -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal libbacky_x_core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers /opt/homebrew/Cellar/curl/8.14.0/lib/libcurl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/curl/8.14.0/lib/libcurl.dylib
